summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification shard. No GitHub mutations are planned. Closed listed PRs are kept closed, security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling, and open non-security PRs are left open for their existing review/proof/maintainer paths.

actions.reason: Already merged/closed; no close action is valid.
Focused active feature PR with no duplicate/superseding target in this shard.
Open broad provider PR remains independent review work; failing checks and unresolved review findings block merge but do not justify closure.
Active maintainer-owned PR with review findings and product/scope decisions requiring human judgment.
Linked implementation remains related and open; blockers prevent merge/fixed-by-candidate closeout, not non-mutating classification.
Active linked implementation path should remain open rather than be closed or merged by inventory cleanup.
Security-sensitive config/raw-redaction PR must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling.
Security-sensitive Docker/setup script changes must be quarantined to central security handling.
Focused open implementation remains related to its own product bug/feature path and should not be closed in this inventory pass.
Focused open implementation remains useful and should stay open for proof/rebase/review.

needs_human: #89826 requires maintainer/product judgment because a maintainer-owned PR has active re-review requests and unresolved scope/UI review findings.
